notes: Futures up on Iran de-escalation and lower oil, VIX eased to 18.2 and last week's chip rout stabilizing — nudging from risk-off to neutral at 0.5. But Big Tech earnings dominate this week (AAPL/META within days) plus jobs/Fed-speak data, so keeping sizing modest and parking event-risk names.
journal_entry: Mon 7/20 09:00: upgraded risk-off->neutral, 0.4->0.5 as Iran talks calm the tape, oil falls, VIX steady 18.2 and book firm (REZI +6.3%, CVI +6.6%, JXN/VOD/ABT/SPY green). Still parking AAPL/META (Big Tech earnings imminent), weak TSLA/ANAB, tech/crypto. Watching earnings landmines and this week's econ data.
